    toMoveData(Move) - Methode in Klasse persistance.GamePersistenceManager
    Helpermethod for GamePersistenceManager.createGameState(PlayerEntity, PlayerEntity, PlayerEntity, History, int, int, int, String).
    toPlayerData(PlayerEntity) - Methode in Klasse persistance.GamePersistenceManager
    Helpermethod for GamePersistenceManager.createGameState(PlayerEntity, PlayerEntity, PlayerEntity, History, int, int, int, String).
    tryExecutePlayerMove(MouseEvent) - Methode in Klasse view.GUIBoard
    Attempts to execute a player move by checking if the mouse was released over a valid node.
    tryMoves(Map.Entry<String, Supplier<Node[]>>...) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
    Iterates through a list of move-generating tactics and returns the first non-null move set produced by any of the tactics.

    TurnTimer - Klasse in boardLogic
    This class implements a turn timer that counts down the time a player has to perform a move.

    Construct a new timer.
